changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_account (email, password_hash, password_login_enabled, enabled, last_login_at) SELECT 'admin@example.com', '{bcrypt}$2y$10$C07jFOscKcjb5GSLlLCIqeovZRE3DV0FdQcf4VnD8PJy2cwDBLqdm', TRUE, TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_account WHERE lower(email) = 'admin@example.com' );
